title: Fiula Blay
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Fiula Blay |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]];Fiula Blay is [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'', which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. ''[[Right to Rule]]'', above [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Gray]] {{C|in [[ooglith masquer]] disguise}} |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Greetings, Fiula Blay. Won't you take a seat while we wait on the arrival of the others?|Jacen Solo, to Fiula Blay|}} '''Fiula Blay''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who acted as an undercover [[Spy/Legends|agent]] leading a resistance cell within the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Blay utilized an organic [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] known as an [[ooglith masquer]] to appear [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Following the [[Battle of Bastion]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], Blay's identity was revealed by [[YVH-M|modified mouse droids]] [[Programmer/Legends|programmed]] to detect Yuuzhan Vong infiltrators. She, along with other detected [[Saboteur/Legends|infiltrators]] and Yuuzhan Vong sympathizers, were summoned by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to a staffing meeting aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] ''[[Right to Rule]]'' above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]]. At the meeting, the final infiltrator to arrive, [[Torvin Xyn]], immediately attacked Solo, while Blay was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in the skirmish that followed. ==Biography== {{Quote|This wasn't necessary. They had a chance to come peacefully.''"
"''Did you really think they would?''"
"''You never know. Maybe sending their most dangerous and aggressive warriors in to be killed by us will eventually reduce the gene pool, breed a more temperate Yuuzhan Vong.|Gilad Pellaeon and Jacen Solo, lamenting the infiltrators' deaths|}} Fiula Blay was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as an undercover [[Spy/Legends|operative]] leading a resistance cell within the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] with at least four other members during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] Yuuzhan Vong invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. She utilized an [[ooglith masquer]], an organic [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] that made her appear as a plain-looking [[Human/Legends|Human]] woman with [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] tied up in a bun. Following the [[Battle of Bastion]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], modified [[YVH-M|mouse droids]] [[Programmer/Legends|programmed]] to detect disguised Yuuzhan Vong were sent [[Starship/Legends|ship]]-to-ship throughout the [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] to uncover infiltrators. The [[MSE-series|droids]] discovered Blay and two other cloaked Yuuzhan Vong and, by analyzing their communications, uncovered more than a dozen sympathizers. In order to avoid alerting them to their discovery, these [[Saboteur/Legends|infiltrators]] and sympathizers were summoned to a staffing meeting arranged by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], who intended to bring their spying to an end. Quietly, the Imperial forces transferred the group to the ''[[Right to Rule]]'', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] stationed above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]]. First, the sympathizers were brought in individually to prevent them from recognizing their fellow conspirators. Blay arrived five [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] before the final sympathizer, showing no signs of suspicion, followed shortly after by the remaining two Yuuzhan Vong. As they awaited the arrival of [[Torvin Xyn]], the final infiltrator, Blay and her cloaked comrade remained undeterred by the meeting, though several of the sympathizers began to suspect the meeting's true nature. Upon Xyn's arrival, he realized Solo—who was present at the meeting—was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and immediately removed his masquer and launched an attack, with the other Yuuzhan Vong following suit shortly after. Without their [[Vonduun crab/Legends|vonduun crab]] [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|armor]] and wielding only their [[amphistaff]]s, all three infiltrators were quickly [[Death/Legends|killed]], with Blay being cut down by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]]. Afterward, Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], who witnessed the meeting, lamented the unnecessary deaths of the infiltrators to a skeptical Solo. ==Personality and traits== Upon her arrival at the meeting for the discovered Yuuzhan Vong infiltrators, Blay, believing her cover to be intact, remained calm and did not question why she was there. While the other spies present at the meeting began showing signs of concern as they realized why they were there, Blay and her fellow Yuuzhan Vong did not flinch or show any signs of worry. Blay only abandoned her disguise after Torvyn Xyn, a fellow Yuuzhan Vong, burst out of his disguise and launched an attack on Jacen Solo. ==Equipment== As an infiltrator, Blay relied on an ooglith masquer to operate in secret within the Imperial forces. Additionally, she was also equipped with an amphistaff and did not wear vonduun crab [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. ==Behind the scenes== Fiula Blay appeared in the [[2003]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'', written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Fuila Blay }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Blay, Fiula}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Spies]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong]]
